description: AA-04.3 bounded-latency fairness, wakeup, and no-leak regression pack for kernel fast path validation.

regression_dimensions.description: Cancel-lane fairness under sustained cancel storms. Verifies no task starvation when cancel_streak is near limit.
Cross-worker steal fairness under asymmetric load. Verifies no single worker monopolizes steal targets.
No lost wakeups under concurrent wake/park races. Verifies task progress under aggressive parking.
Wake coalescing does not suppress unique wakes. Verifies bloom filter false positives do not cause lost wakeups.
All obligations are settled during region close under fast-path. No obligation leaks across region boundaries.
Runtime quiesces cleanly under fast-path with all tasks drained and workers parked.
p99 task scheduling latency does not regress versus incumbent path.
p99 cancel-lane latency bounded under epoch transitions.

tail_table_format.description: Tail latency comparison table format for before/after analysis.

fallback_surfaces.rollback_action: Disable shard-local batch buffer, revert to Mutex<IntrusiveStack>
Disable bloom filter front-end, revert to direct Mutex<HashSet<TaskId>>
Disable EMA-based lookahead, revert to fixed power-of-two-choices

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate fairness invariants under cancel and steal pressure
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa043 cargo test --test bounded_latency_regression_contract fairness -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate wakeup correctness and coalescing safety
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa043 cargo test --test bounded_latency_regression_contract wakeup -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate obligation no-leak and quiescence invariants
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa043 cargo test --test bounded_latency_regression_contract leak -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa043 cargo test --test bounded_latency_regression_contract tail -- --nocapture
